case_title: OBERG MAURICE DBA CERTIFIED HEALTH SERVICES VS MACK NEWMAN INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MACK NEWMAN RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OBERG MAURICE DBA CERTIFIED HEALTH SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MACK NEWMAN INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OBERG MAURICE DBA CERTIFIED HEALTH SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MACK NEWMAN INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
